The output function of the topgeneboxplot module

Source: R/topgeneboxplot.R
topgeneboxplotOutput.Rd

The output function of the topgeneboxplot module

Usage

topgeneboxplotOutput(id)

Arguments

id

Submodule namespace

Value

output An HTML tag object that can be rendered as HTML using as.character()

Examples

topgeneboxplotOutput("topgeneboxplot")
#> Error in topgeneboxplotOutput("topgeneboxplot"): could not find function "topgeneboxplotOutput"
